/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/fcitx5-typeforge.dir/link.d  -o fcitx5-typeforge.so "CMakeFiles/fcitx5-typeforge.dir/TypeForgeEngine.cpp.o"  /usr/lib/libFcitx5Core.so.5.1.21 -Wl,--whole-archive /home/jefino9488/RustroverProjects/TypeForge/adapters/fcitx5/cpp/../../../target/release/libtypeforge_fcitx5_bridge.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -ldl -lpthread -lm /usr/lib/libFcitx5Config.so.5.1.21 /usr/lib/libFcitx5Utils.so.5.1.21
